<!-- SPECKIT START -->
For product and architecture context, read in order:

1. **specs/001-treplica-product-spec/ecosystem.md** — full system map (start here)
2. **specs/001-treplica-product-spec/spec.md** — requirements FR-001–FR-037, user stories US1–US10
3. **specs/001-treplica-product-spec/plan.md** — technical plan, structure, performance budgets
4. **specs/001-treplica-product-spec/data-model.md** — SQLite + app_settings entities
5. **specs/001-treplica-product-spec/contracts/** — desktop-app, local-data, session-context, assistant-presets, app-settings, provider-adapter

User-facing flows: **docs/user-guide.md**
<!-- SPECKIT END -->
